data.description: TRUMP’S $100,000 H-1B VISA APPLICATION FEE UPHELD BY JUDGE

data.title: Ascendant Holidays at Vista Cay Resort in Orlando, Florida, awarded RCI® Gold Crown for 3rd year in a row for excellence in guest satisfaction and hospitality.
data.description: The esteemed recognition underscores the unfailing commitment to guest contentment, top-notch hospitality norms, and superior resort standards in Orlando, Florida. In a recent development on December 23, 2025, Ascendant Holidays joyfully declares that Ascendant Holidays at Vista Cay Resort has clinched the prestigious designation.
Taiwan’s overnight interbank rate begins session at 0.805%, flat from prior open.
30-year JGB yield up 1 bp to 3.435%.

- S&P Global Ratings

data.title: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. announces December distribution for Faircourt Fund (CBOE: FGX), payable to shareholders.
data.description: Toronto, December 23, 2025 - Faircourt Asset Management Inc., acting as the Manager of the Faircourt Fund (CBOE: FGX), has disclosed the monthly distribution that will be paid on the Fund's Shares.

data.title: Investors shift towards stock-specific leadership amid market volatility, focusing on companies with clear execution paths - VanEck.
data.description: In the face of initial market fluctuations, investors are turning to strategies based on fundamental analysis, honing in on companies that possess well-defined plans for growth, as outlined by VanEck. This shift reflects a growing emphasis on stability and security, with a notable interest in high-quality investments.
General Atlantic partners with Ollamani in Mexico to establish a strategic alliance, according to a statement.

data.title: Investors reevaluate big pharma cos. as GLP-1, AI drug discovery, and healthcare trends reshape industry.
data.description: VanEck reports that major pharmaceutical firms are being reassessed by investors following advancements in GLP-1, artificial intelligence in drug discovery, and shifts in healthcare consumption habits. The reassessment has been prompted by the sector experiencing significant changes that are driving interest and scrutiny.
NHK reports Japan is set to issue a ¥29.6 trillion government bond to fund the FY 2026 budget.
FDA clears Agios’ Aqvesme™ for alpha- and beta-thalassemia anemia in adults.

data.title: Boviet Solar earns "Grade A" in Wood Mackenzie's H1 2025 rankings. Specializes in monocrystalline PV cells and premium PV modules.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in San José, California, Boviet Solar Technology Co. Ltd. announced its expertise in advanced monocrystalline PV cells and premium Gamma Series™ Monofacial and Vega Series™ Bifacial PV modules. The company is a key player in solar energy technology, offering innovative solutions in the industry.
South Korea plans to prolong the car consumption tax reduction for an additional six months.
South Korean won extends gains to multi-week high after news of strategic pension fund FX hedging.
New Zealand dollar steadies near strongest levels since October against the U.S. dollar, trading just below mid-0.5800s.
Gold prices climbed 0.5%, pushing spot gold to a record high of $4,512.66 per ounce.
According to the State Department, the U.S. signed four additional global health MOUs with Madagascar, Sierra Leone, Botswana, and Ethiopia.

data.title: Canterra Minerals completes $5.7M flow-through private placement for Newfoundland exploration.
data.description: Yesterday, a record-breaking number of 1,500 new cases were reported in the region, bringing the total number of cases to 25,000. Additionally, there were 10 new deaths, with the death toll now standing at 500. The surge in cases has prompted local authorities to announce stricter safety measures, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings. This spike serves as a stark reminder of the importance of following guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.
Iran, US stress diplomacy at UN, but nuclear deal divide persists.
